title: brassica fruticulosa subsp. glaberrima
intro: Brassica fruticulosa subsp. glaberrima, also known as wild cabbage, is a subspecies of the Brassica fruticulosa plant, which is a type of wild mustard. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been found to have a positive effect on various health conditions. The health benefits of Brassica fruticulosa subsp. glaberrima include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing protection against certain types of cancer. It is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in cooking as a spice, although it should be used in moderation due to its pungent flavor and potential side effects.
